$exampleSchema._comment: Example only — documents the shape. The renderer reads `entries`, not this key. Drop entries with newest first. `kind` is one of "feat" | "fix". Date format YYYY-MM-DD.
$exampleSchema.headline: Short tagline shown as the section title

items.text: Description of a new feature.
Description of a bug fix.
The EXPORT button on Paper.nu now glows purple so you can find it at a glance — pairs with the calendar-export walkthrough.

When you click Paper.nu's "Export schedule to calendar" Download button, get a step-by-step walkthrough for adding the file to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook — with one-click jumps straight to the import page.

entries.headline: See your weekly study load at a glance

items.text: See your estimated weekly out-of-class study hours at the top of Paper.nu — hover for the per-class breakdown.
New "Lazy mode" sort for schedule combinations — lightest workload first.
Paper.nu cart chips now show what you're enrolled in vs. still in your cart.
Changing the schedule-combinations sort jumps back to combo #1.

entries.headline: See CTECs by course or by prof

items.text: See CTECs from a broader angle: every prof who's taught the course, or every course your prof has taught. Pick one and we remember it for that section.
Cross-listed sections (like COMP_SCI 346 / COMP_ENG 346) now show real per-section seat counts instead of the pooled total.
Hide already-taken courses from Paper.nu search with a new switch above the results.
Eligibility checks on Paper.nu catch more prereqs now — they read CAESAR's official requirement text on top of the structured list.

entries.headline: Filter Sharper Search by Foundational Discipline

items.text: Filter Sharper Search by Weinberg's Foundational Disciplines — toggle Nat Sci, Emp Ded, Soc Beh, History, Ethics, or Lit Arts to narrow results, and see at a glance which a course fulfills from the icons on every card.
Searching something like "comp_sci 3" in Sharper Search now lists courses in catalog-number order (300, 305, … 349, …) instead of by title length.

entries.headline: See what you're eligible to take, on Paper.nu

items.text: Paper.nu search now shows little eligibility badges on every course based on what you've already taken in CAESAR — click the chip above the results to hide the ones you can't take yet.
Schedule cards on Paper.nu pick up a small ✓ or ? marker — hover to see what the course is asking for.
Your CAESAR course history is now cached and viewable in the popup under "My courses".

entries.headline: Missing grad year? You're in; schedule combinations

items.text: Cycle every non-overlapping schedule of your Paper.nu classes — pin sections, set a credit range, sort by CTEC rating.
If we couldn't read your expected graduation year from CAESAR, the extension now unlocks anyway instead of holding you back.
Loading CTECs on Sharper Search now signs you in properly instead of getting stuck.
Accessing CTECs on CAESAR normally works now.
Smoother, more consistent CTEC analytics colors.
